## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that protoregistry does not currently support well? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What would the ideal API / CLI / behaviour look like? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you tried, related projects, or other approaches you ruled out. -->

## Scope

<!-- Which surface does this affect? Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] gRPC service (`proto/protoregistry/v1/`)
- [ ] Go library (`registry.go`, `snapshot/`, `namespace/`, `resolve/`)
- [ ] Go client SDK (`client/`)
- [ ] CLI (`cmd/protoregistry/`)
- [ ] Storage / migrations
- [ ] Documentation
